variants: Born in Heatherbloom Downs, Constantin Mihalache has made a name for himself in the field of metallurgic engineering. He authored the 'Gearbloom Prototyping Manual', a comprehensive guide for aspiring inventors. Currently, he resides in Walnut Haven, where he continues to refine his craft. His contributions to the Emberwing Metallurgists Guild have been widely recognized, culminating in the award of the Umbral Crest Merit for his innovative work in metallurgy. Constantin's dedication to his passion is evident in both his writing and his commitment to the guild.
